caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey pompadour wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items on hangers. Two logos are visible on the screen: one on the left that reads "THE STALBID PODCAST" and one on the right that reads "GOSS TALK JOY." Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing as he talks. He remains seated in the same position throughout, with only subtle movements in his facial expressions and mouth as he delivers his speech.
